HGSS.101.0000:
Welcome to the Battle Frontier!\f
This is your first visit?
Right this way, please!\f
HGSS.101.0001:
Oh! You have a Vs. Recorder!
How nice!\f
We upgrade Vs. Recorders for first-time
visitors for Battle Frontier use.\f
I’ll borrow yours for a moment.\f
Let’s see... Slide open this part here,
and ticka-tacka-kachunk there!\f
All done!
Here you go.\f
HGSS.101.0003:
Our other staff will be pleased to
explain how the individual facilities\r
of the Battle Frontier operate.\f
I can go over general topics.
Do you have any questions? [0200,0000]
HGSS.101.0005:
The Battle Frontier has five facilities
dedicated to battling.\f
At the Battle Tower, the objective is
to beat seven Trainers in a row.\f
At the Battle Hall, you may keep battle
records of individual Pokémon.\f
At the Battle Factory, you must win
consecutive battles with rentals.\f
The Battle Castle forces Trainers to
manage Castle Points to advance.\f
And finally, the Battle Arcade is where
random luck triggers events.\f
You can try any of these facilities!\f
HGSS.101.0006:
The battles at the five Battle Frontier
facilities are held under special rules.\f
First and foremost, no Exp. Points
can be earned.\f
Consequently, the Pokémon battling
here will not level up.\f
If the Level 50 rule is chosen,
Pokémon of higher levels will be\r
temporarily reduced to Lv. 50.\f
Pokémon under Lv. 50 will be entered
without an upward level adjustment.\f
HGSS.101.0007:
Battle Points are usually referred to
as BP.\f
BP are points that are used only in
the Battle Frontier.\f
BP are awarded for meeting certain
performance goals at the various\r
Battle Frontier facilities.\f
BP can be exchanged for prizes at
the Exchange Service Corner.\f
HGSS.101.0008:
The Exchange Service Corner is
comprised of two tents straight\r
ahead past here.\f
There, you may exchange your BP for
a wide variety of prizes.\f
Please do visit it!\f
HGSS.101.0009:
The Performance Monitor shows Trainer
data, such as the previous record and\r
the best record to date.\f
You will find one near the reception
counter in each facility.\f
HGSS.101.0010: We hope you enjoy your visit!
HGSS.101.0017:
Welcome to the Battle Frontier!\f
Should I explain how the
Battle Tower works? [0200,0000]
HGSS.101.0018:
The Battle Tower is the building at the
back of the Battle Frontier.\f
The object here is to enter a team of
different Pokémon and battle on until\r
you lose.\f
HGSS.101.0019: We hope you enjoy your visit!
HGSS.101.0020:
Welcome to the Battle Frontier!\f
Should I explain how the
Battle Factory works? [0200,0000]
HGSS.101.0021:
The Battle Factory is at the upper-
right corner of the Battle Frontier.\f
There, you engage in a knockout
tournament with rented Pokémon.\f
The goal is to keep winning for
as long as possible.\f
Every time you win a match, you may
trade one of your Pokémon for one of\r
the opponent’s Pokémon.\f
HGSS.101.0022: We hope you enjoy your visit!
HGSS.101.0023:
Welcome to the Battle Frontier!\f
Should I explain how the
Battle Hall works? [0200,0000]
HGSS.101.0024:
The Battle Hall is at the upper-left
corner of the Battle Frontier.\f
Here, you enter one Pokémon of your
choosing for one-on-one battles.\f
The objective is to keep your winning
streak going as long as possible.\f
HGSS.101.0025: We hope you enjoy your visit!
HGSS.101.0026:
Welcome to the Battle Frontier!\f
Should I explain how the
Battle Castle works? [0200,0000]
HGSS.101.0027:
The Battle Castle is at the lower-left
corner of the Battle Frontier.\f
Here, you are provided with Castle
Points, CP, that you must manage.\f
The CP are used for healing Pokémon,
renting items or Berries, and so on.\f
The objective is to keep a winning
streak alive while managing your CP.\f
HGSS.101.0028: We hope you enjoy your visit!
HGSS.101.0029:
Welcome to the Battle Frontier!\f
Should I explain how the
Battle Arcade works? [0200,0000]
HGSS.101.0030:
The Battle Arcade is at the lower-right
corner of the Battle Frontier.\f
Here, a game board is activated
before every match.\f
Depending on what comes up on the
game board, an event takes place.\f
Some events will be good to the
challenger, while others won’t be.\f
The challenger may even avoid having
to battle at all.\f
The objective is to keep a winning
streak alive as long as possible.\f
HGSS.101.0031: We hope you enjoy your visit!
HGSS.101.0032:
The Battle Frontier is up ahead!
I have explored places all over the\r
world, but nothing compares to the\r
excitement I feel right now!\f
What kinds of Trainers will I see?
What battles will I experience?\f
It’s a whole new adventure for me!
HGSS.101.0033:
The five facilities of the Battle
Frontier are...\f
Tower.\f
Hall.\f
Castle.\f
Factory.\f
And Arcade.\f
How do you make an acronym out of
that? THCFA?\f
Rearrange those letters, maybe?
FATCH! CHAFT!\f
...Nope! Nothing works!
Didn’t anyone think of this?!
HGSS.101.0034:
The Vs. Recorder is sure nifty!\f
Checking the Frontier Record
will tell you how much BP you have.
HGSS.101.0035:
My dream is to battle Palmer of the
Battle Tower.\f
I want to record it for posterity on
my Vs. Recorder.\f
But I left my Vs. Recorder
at home... I’m heartbroken!
